title: Firefox frequently freezes and crashes specifically when watching YouTube videos.
content:
I am experiencing significant stability issues with Firefox. When I use YouTube, the entire browser frequently hangs (becomes unresponsive) and eventually crashes. This does not happen on all websites, but it is consistent when playing video content on YouTube.

  • Symptoms: The browser "stacks" or freezes completely; I cannot click tabs or menus until the browser finally closes/crashes.
  • Extensions: I am currently using extensions like SponsorBlock, uBlock origin. I am unsure if this is the cause, but the issue persists during video playback.
  • Hardware: I am running this on a laptop with an 16gb 4800mhz RAM, i7 12th Gen processor and an RTX 3070 GPU.


  1. Is there a known compatibility issue between current Firefox builds and SponsorBlock or similar video-modifying extensions?
  1. Could this be related to hardware acceleration settings with my NVIDIA GPU?
  1. What steps should I take to provide crash logs to help identify the root cause?

title: Visual and interactional offset issue in Vertical tabs ui
content:
Issue: Rapidly scrolling up or down often creates an unintended blank space (margin) at the top or bottom of the tab list.

Symptom: When this gap appears, the mouse cursor's focus becomes misaligned with the actual tab selection point by the height of that gap.

Behavior: Scrolling back toward the gap usually forces it to disappear, which also restores the correct alignment between the cursor and the selection point.

Reproducibility: The exact trigger is inconsistent. While it happens most often during fast scrolling, it sometimes occurs during slow scrolls as well. The frequency is unpredictable—sometimes occurring every time, and other times once in five attempts.

title: Tabbing from URL box to search box should NOT highlight the search engine dropdown
content:
1. Enable the search box to the right side of URL box in browser UI.
  2. Open new tab (empty URL box).
  3. Press TAB.
  4. The search engine SELECTOR becomes highlighted, instead of the search INPUT.
  5. Web application software developer is blocked from typing search query right away.
  6. Must press ANOTHER TAB.
  7. This breaks the workflow. It never used to do this, you could type immediately after tabbing ONCE.
  8. Search is disabled in URL box to facilitate local domain resolution/error and NOT trigger fallback searching.

Please revert the behaviour to normal, and make the single TAB operation focus on the search INPUT.
